## Summary

Describe the problem and the proposed solution.

## Engineering impact

- [ ] API behavior considered
- [ ] Model/reproducibility impact considered
- [ ] Security and privacy impact considered
- [ ] Observability impact considered
- [ ] Deployment and rollback impact considered

## Validation

- [ ] Python tests pass
- [ ] Go tests pass
- [ ] Static analysis passes
- [ ] Docker Compose validates
- [ ] Application images build
- [ ] Documentation is updated

## Evidence

Include logs, screenshots, benchmark results, or links to CI artifacts where relevant.

## Rollback plan

Explain how this change can be safely reverted or disabled.
